user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] System detected Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected for account Northwind Traders. Generating output.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-11 15:53 EST
Subject: executive brief - Action Required

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about executive brief. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
Date: 2024-02-23 15:59 EST
Subject: Re: executive brief Discussion - Next Steps

There's been a change in our timeline for executive brief. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-25 11:31 EST
Subject: Follow-up: executive brief Review

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with executive brief. What are the next steps from your side?

Meeting: executive brief Discussion - Northwind Traders
Date: 2024-02-17
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders), Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft)

[00:01:15] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is executive brief.

[00:08:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): Let me add some context -- we've been working on vendor dependencies and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.

[00:13:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is resource allocation.

[00:16:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): The timeline for security compliance is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:21:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): On the executive brief front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around vendor dependencies.

[00:23:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): The timeline for technical validation is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:25:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about resource allocation. Can we address those?
